lines: Am I ready for the big bag?

steps.prompt: Four signs: two sets of long narrow pointed leaves; stem slim but upright; white threads in the cup; 80 to 100 mm tall. Upright beats thick. I may need an extra week. Be patient!
Move me at surface level, like Okki. No deep burial! Snap a photo.
Pour 300 ml, that's 3 Cuppys, slowly in circles.

steps.q: How much water after the big move?

steps.prompt: Show me your Chilly! Take a progress photo.
